title: Verstappen Totem
description: This texture pack adds a totem with the looks of Max Verstappen and also a custom sound
body:
This Resource Pack adds a Totem looking like Max Verstappen and even adds the sound of the Totem Pop of the Max Verstappen Song (DUDUDUDU MAX VERSTAPPEN) but be careful it is a bit loud if many people pop their totem near you. 

If there are any errors or bugs please let me know on discord: supergamer2345
